series_metadata.series_description: Request (JFS-04069) for a state hearing to appeal ODJFS action denying assistance to an individual. Documentation identifies appellant, appellant's address, program, county, dates action issued, and action appeal. Hearing request used for data entry into CRISE, Client Registry Information System Enhanced.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper documents 60 days after prepped, imaged, indexed, and quality contral of has been completed, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 7 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
